AJHR 1919 lists Southbridge (grade 2, 28 pupils) under Otago ED, but no Southbridge locality exists in any Otago/Clutha reference. All sources (polling Ellesmere ED, gazetteer Canterbury, railway records) confirm Southbridge = Canterbury/Ellesmere County. Canterbury ED separately lists Southbridge DHS (grade 4B, 163 pupils) — a distinct school. Likely AJHR transcription error.
notes: Probable AJHR source error; cannot assign county
